model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board.png is the accepted v2 built-in image_gen identity canary; v1 was rejected because its front view put the satchel on the wrong body side

negativeConstraints: no duplicate or relabeled direction cells
north must show no face and adjacent diagonals must expose opposite back shoulders
the blank registration board remains on the subject's own right and the sealed satchel remains on her own left
no text, labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark, shadow or scenery
no coins, banking props, open merchandise, manor keys, modern uniform or displayed goods
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying

identityBoard.relationship: accepted pre-expansion identity canary generated by a targeted correction of the archived v1 board; not an owner approval record

observedBackgroundFact: All three accepted generated images are fully opaque, but their measured near-magenta backdrops are spatially varying and contain no exact #FF00FF pixels; formal processing must derive and archive reviewed masks from the untouched source bytes. The first world source was rejected fail-closed because its top-row feet crossed a cell boundary; accepted v2 was cleanly regenerated with safe per-cell padding rather than cropped or erased.
